ResizeMask.name: ResizeMask
ResizeMask.description: Resizes the mask or batch of masks to the specified width and height.

MaskTransparentInOutNode.name: MaskTransparentInOutNode
MaskTransparentInOutNode.display_name: Mask Transparent In-Out (首尾透明过渡)

GetImageSize.name: GetImageSize
GetImageSize.description: 返回图像的宽度和高度，并原样传递图像。

VHS_VideoCombine.name: VHS_VideoCombine
VHS_VideoCombine.description: Combine an image sequence into a video

VHS_GetImageCount.name: VHS_GetImageCount
VHS_GetImageCount.description: Return the number of images in an input as an INT

video.tooltip: The video to extract components from.

BAGetVideoComponents.name: BAGetVideoComponents
BAGetVideoComponents.description: Extracts all components from a video: frames, audio, and framerate.

image.tooltip: Input image to be processed for background removal.

model.tooltip: Select the background removal model to use (RMBG-2.0, INSPYRENET, BEN).

sensitivity.tooltip: Adjust the strength of mask detection (higher values result in more aggressive detection).

process_res.tooltip: Set the processing resolution (higher values require more VRAM and may increase processing time).

mask_blur.tooltip: Specify the amount of blur to apply to the mask edges (0 for no blur, higher values for more blur).

mask_offset.tooltip: Adjust the mask boundary (positive values expand the mask, negative values shrink it).

invert_output.tooltip: Enable to invert both the image and mask output (useful for certain effects).

refine_foreground.tooltip: Use Fast Foreground Colour Estimation to optimize transparent background

background.tooltip: Choose output type: Alpha (transparent) or Color (custom background color).

background_color.tooltip: Pick background color (supports alpha, use color picker).

LayerUtility: GetMainColorsV2.name: LayerUtility: GetMainColorsV2
LayerUtility: GetMainColorsV2.display_name: 图层工具：获取主颜色 V2

color.tooltip: Color as RGB values in range 0-255, separated by commas.

ImagePadKJ.name: ImagePadKJ
ImagePadKJ.description: Pad the input image and optionally mask with the specified padding.
